configDescription: 8-stage profile builder - Email consent checkbox added (Basic Info), Work Experience gated by has_work_experience boolean, Test Scores fixed object sections per exam, Study Prefs: preferred_countries removed + intake_year limited to 2026-2027 + intakes as boxes + Other programs write-in, Financial in EUR, Compliance merged into single consent tick

steps.title: Basic Information
steps.description: Provide your personal and contact details

fields.name: full_name
fields.label: Full Name
fields.help_text: Your full name

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone Number
fields.help_text: Enter your 10-digit mobile number

validation.message: Enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number

fields.name: date_of_birth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.help_text: Your date of birth for age verification

validation.message: You must be at least 16 years old

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.help_text: Your current nationality

fields.name: current_city
fields.label: Current City
fields.help_text: Your current city of residence

fields.name: current_country
fields.label: Current Country
fields.help_text: Your current country of residence

fields.name: passport_number
fields.label: Passport Number
fields.help_text: Your valid passport number (if available)

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email
fields.help_text: Enter your email for admin

fields.name: email_password
fields.label: Email Password
fields.help_text: Your valid password for the email

fields.name: email_password_consent
fields.label: Email & Password Authorized Consent
fields.help_text: By submitting your Email ID and Password, you authorize us to use them for admission and visa processing purposes only. Please do not enable 2-Step Verification or change your password until your visa process is completed.

steps.title: Education Background
steps.description: Add your educational history. Click + to add each level (High School, Bachelor's, etc.)

fields.name: education_entries
fields.label: Education History
fields.help_text: Add each level of your education. Click the + button to add more.

item_fields.name: education_level
item_fields.label: Education Level
item_fields.help_text: e.g.,10th, Diploma, High School, Bachelor's, Master's, PhD

item_fields.name: field_of_study
item_fields.label: Field of Study
item_fields.help_text: Your major or area of specialization

item_fields.name: institution_name
item_fields.label: Institution/School Name
item_fields.placeholder: e.g., Delhi Public School, University of Toronto

validation.message: Please enter a valid start year

item_fields.name: end_year
item_fields.label: End Year
item_fields.help_text: Year of graduation or expected graduation

validation.message: Please enter a valid end year

item_fields.name: academic_honors
item_fields.label: Academic Honors & Awards
item_fields.placeholder: List any academic achievements, honors, or awards

steps.title: Test Scores
steps.description: Fill in the scores for the exams you have taken. Leave blank if not applicable.

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Overall Band Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 0-9

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Total Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 0-120

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Total Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 260-340

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Total Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 205-805

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Total Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 400-1600

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Total Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 0-720

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Composite Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 1-36

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Overall Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 10-160

fields.name: overall_score
fields.label: Overall Score
fields.help_text: Score range: 10-90

fields.name: exam_name
fields.label: Exam Name
fields.placeholder: e.g., Cambridge C1 Advanced, JLPT, HSK

steps.title: Study Preferences
steps.description: Tell us about your study abroad preferences and goals

fields.name: degree_level
fields.label: Target Degree Level
fields.help_text: The degree level you are applying for

fields.name: preferred_programs
fields.label: Preferred Programs/Fields
fields.help_text: Select your preferred areas of study. If Other, specify below.

fields.name: preferred_programs_other
fields.label: Specify Other Program/Field
fields.placeholder: e.g., Sports Management, Film Studies, Urban Planning
fields.help_text: Please specify your program or field of interest

fields.name: intake_year
fields.label: Intake Year
fields.help_text: Year you plan to start your studies (within the next 1-2 years)

fields.name: intake_semester
fields.label: Intake Semester
fields.help_text: Select one or more intake seasons you are targeting

steps.title: Work Experience
steps.description: Share your professional and work experience (if any) - this section is optional

validation.message: Please enter valid years of experience

fields.name: work_experiences
fields.label: Work Experience Details
fields.help_text: Add your work experiences (company, role, duration)

fields.name: experience_summary
fields.label: Work/Research Experience Summary
fields.placeholder: e.g., 2 years of experience as Software Developer at XYZ Company...
fields.help_text: Brief summary of your work or research experience (used for document generation)

fields.name: skills
fields.label: Technical/Professional Skills
fields.placeholder: e.g., Python, Java, Machine Learning, Data Analysis, Project Management...
fields.help_text: List your key technical and professional skills

fields.name: projects
fields.label: Notable Projects
fields.placeholder: e.g., Developed a machine learning model for sentiment analysis...
fields.help_text: Brief description of your notable academic or professional projects

fields.name: internships
fields.label: Internships
fields.help_text: Add any internship experiences

fields.name: volunteer_work
fields.label: Volunteer Work
fields.placeholder: Describe any volunteer or community service experience

steps.title: Financial Information
steps.description: Provide information about your financial capacity and funding sources (amounts in EUR)

fields.name: budget_range
fields.label: Annual Budget Range (EUR)
fields.help_text: Your estimated annual budget for tuition and living expenses in Euros

fields.name: funding_source
fields.label: Funding Source
fields.help_text: How will you fund your education? (select all that apply)

fields.name: sponsor_name
fields.label: Financial Sponsor Name
fields.help_text: If applicable, who is sponsoring your education?

steps.title: Career Goals
steps.description: Share your academic and career aspirations

fields.name: academic_goals
fields.label: Academic Goals
fields.placeholder: What do you hope to achieve academically?
fields.help_text: Describe your academic objectives and what you want to learn

fields.name: career_goals
fields.label: Career Goals
fields.placeholder: What are your long-term career aspirations?
fields.help_text: Describe your career plans after completing your studies

fields.name: motivation
fields.label: Motivation for Studying Abroad
fields.placeholder: e.g., I am motivated to study abroad because...
fields.help_text: Explain your motivation for pursuing this program abroad

fields.name: post_study_plans
fields.label: Post-Study Plans
fields.help_text: What do you plan to do after graduation?

steps.title: Compliance & Consent
steps.description: Review and accept our terms, policies, and consent forms to submit your profile

fields.name: full_consent
fields.label: I agree to all of the following: (1) Terms & Conditions, (2) Privacy Policy, (3) Data processing and retention for application purposes under GDPR, (4) That all information provided is accurate and I consent to background verification if required, and (5) Sharing my data with universities and partner institutions for application purposes.
fields.help_text: You must tick this box to confirm your agreement with all the above before submitting. Read our Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy for full details.

validation.message: You must accept all terms and conditions to submit your profile.

fields.name: marketing_consent
fields.label: Marketing Communications Consent (Optional) - Receive updates about programs, scholarships, and opportunities
fields.help_text: Tick this if you'd like to receive news and offers from UNI360. This is optional.

fields.name: signature
fields.label: Digital Signature
fields.placeholder: Type your full name as signature
fields.help_text: Type your full name to digitally sign this consent form

fields.name: consent_date
fields.label: Consent Date
fields.help_text: Auto-filled with today's date when you submit the form
